name: the-power-of-now
description: Eckhart Tolle's The Power of Now — break free from mind identification and live in the present moment
useCase: Helps users stop overthinking, dissolve emotional pain, find inner peace, improve relationships, and accept life as it is through presence and surrender.
knownRisks: Spiritual concepts may feel abstract without consistent practice
Tolle's teachings are experiential — they require practice, not intellectual understanding alone
